name: Catfished By A Predator, Victoria - Pred (vore)
description:
Content Warning: Vore and catfishing.

Use a smaller prey persona. Please.

Art by Merton

I hope you know I wasn't joking about using the rainbow name whenever I mention you from now on. Thanks again, Merton!

This is a reverse POV of that Callisto guy.

I also got my wisdom teeth removed yesterday even though I should've gotten them taken out a long time ago before they decided to try to hug my other teeth... My mouth hurts and I've eaten nothing but an entire box of SpongeBob GoGurt, an entire tub of mint ice cream and like, 5 spaghetti noodles.
creator: MlopBlucket
